---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or a change to existing behavior
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve**
What's missing or awkward today, and for whom.

**Proposed approach**
How you'd imagine it working. If there's more than one reasonable way to do
it, note the tradeoffs.

**Does this fit Jimothy's scope?**
Jimothy is a single-manager decision-support tool, not a team-collaboration
platform — see [PROJECT_PLAN.md §1](../../PROJECT_PLAN.md#1-concept) and
[§11](../../PROJECT_PLAN.md#11-competitive-gap-closing-roadmap) for what's
deliberately in and out of scope. A quick note on why this fits (or an
argument that the scope should change) helps a lot.
